name: Hidden Evil
short_description: Hidden Evil puts you in a house where you must escape by finding items around the house. But you are not alone. Creatures will appear trying to get into the house and you must use your UV light to defend yourself. Good luck trying to escape.
detailed_description: Step into the chilling world of Hidden Evil, where survival is your only goal. Trapped inside a mysterious house, you must explore every dark corner to uncover hidden items that hold the key to your escape. But beware—you're not alone. Sinister creatures lurk outside, desperate to break in and claim their prey. Your only defense? A powerful UV light that can hold them at bay—if you’re fast enough. Can you outsmart the horrors within and escape before it’s too late? Your courage, strategy, and reflexes will be put to the ultimate test. Good luck—you’ll need it.
